video_title: AI B-roll: Four Jars Burning (candle making)

seconds.vision_desc: row of four identical glass jar candles burning on a dark wooden shelf
camera pans slowly right along the row, each flame small and steady
middle jars in focus, wax tops smooth and even
pan continues, warm light pooling around each jar
third jar centered, gentle flame flutter, far jars soft
shelf grain and jar glass reflections in warm tones
pan eases toward the last jar, flames calm
final framing of the candle row burning evenly

windows.embed_text: four identical glass jar candles burning in a row on a rustic wooden shelf, small steady flames, deep warm tones, far jars softly blurred | slow pan along a row of burning test candles
